Uses of Class
recoder.CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration

Packages that use CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics
 
recoder.kit
 
recoder.kit.transformation
 
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.

  • Uses of CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration in de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ClassInitializeMethodBuilder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
    Creates an instance of the class preparation method model transformer.

    Creates an instance of the class preparation method model transformer.

    ConstructorNormalformBuilder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
    creates the constructor normalform builder
     
    CreateBuilder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
     
     
    CreateObjectBuilder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
     
     
    EnumClassBuilder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
    create a new instance that uses the given service configuration and works on the given list of compilation units
     
    ImplicitFieldAdder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
    creates a transformation that adds all implicit fields, for example <created>, <initialized> and <nextToCreate> etc.
     
    InstanceAllocationMethodBuilder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
     
     
    JMLTransformer(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
    Creates a transformation that adds JML specific elements, for example ghost fields and model method declarations.
     
    LocalClassTransformation(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
     
     
    PrepareObjectBuilder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
     
     
    RecoderModelTransformer(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
    creates a transormder for the recoder model

  • Uses of CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration in recoder.kit.transformation

    Constructors in recoder.kit.transformation with parameters of type CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AppendMember(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, boolean isVisible, MemberDeclaration child, TypeDeclaration parent)
    Deprecated.
    Creates a new transformation object that adds the given MemberDeclaration to the list in the given TypeDeclaration at a convenient position.
     
    Modify(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, boolean isVisible, Declaration decl, int code)
    Creates a new transformation object that modifies a declaration.
     
    PrepareStatementList(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Statement s, boolean isVisible)
    Creates a new transformation object that wraps a statement with a new statement block if necessary.
     
    PrependExpressionWithStatements(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Expression x, Statement statement)
    Creates a new transformation object that inserts the given statement such that no state changes take place between the statement and the evaluation of the expression.
     
    PrependExpressionWithStatements(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Expression x, ASTList<Statement> statements)
    Creates a new transformation object that inserts the given statements such that no state changes take place between the statements and the evaluation of the expression.
     
    RemoveRedundantTypeReferences(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc)
    Creates a new transformation object that removes redundant type references from extends/implements and throws clauses and removes unnecessary type casts.
     
    RemoveRedundantTypeReferences(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, List<CompilationUnit> list, boolean removeInterfaces, boolean removeExceptions, boolean removeTypeCasts)
    Creates a new transformation object that removes redundant type references from extends/implements and throws clauses.
     
    RemoveUnusedImports(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc)
    Creates a new transformation object that removes unused import statements from all compilation units in the source file repository.
     
    RemoveUnusedImports(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, List<CompilationUnit> list)
    Creates a new transformation object that removes unused import statements.
     
    RemoveUnusedImports(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, CompilationUnit cu)
    Creates a new transformation object that removes unused import statements.
     
    RenameMethod(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, MethodDeclaration method, String newName)
    Creates a new transformation object that renames a method and all redefined versions and all references to them.
     
    RenamePackage(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Package pkg, String newName)
    Creates a new transformation object that renames a package and all references to it.
     
    RenameType(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, TypeDeclaration type, String newName)
    Creates a new transformation object that renames a type declaration and all known references to that type.
     
    RenameVariable(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, VariableSpecification vs, String newName)
    Creates a new transformation object that renames a variable and all references to it.
     
    ShiftPreceedingStatementExpressions(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Expression x)
    Creates a new transformation object that shifts statement expressions to initializers of new local variables.
